title: Q3 tractor beam satellite
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
The '''Q3 tractor beam satellite''' was a product of [[Phylon Transport/Legends|Phylon Transport]]. It was less powerful but more precise than the [[Q7 tractor beam projector/Legends|Q7 tractor beam projector]]. It was intended for moving cargo and [[Transport/Legends|transports]], but used for war by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]], which employed the design to knock enemy [[Orbital defense satellite|defense satellites]] out of [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
